sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32818" key="e)kragh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκρᾰγή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔκρηξις</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (prob.<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l.for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κραυγή</ref></xr>, as in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
